name: Huang Guan Yin
terroir: Wuyi rock mineral soil, cross-bred cultivar suited to Wuyi terroir
cultivar: Huang Guan Yin (Huang Jin Gui x Tie Guan Yin hybrid)
flavor_profile: A hybrid that inherits floral brightness from Huang Jin Gui and creamy body from Tie Guan Yin. The cup carries ginger, white pepper, and clover with chestnut and melon sweetness. A spicy aftertaste lingers alongside pronounced Wuyi minerality. Brighter and more aromatic than most yancha.

brewing.tips: The ginger-pepper spice shows up most clearly at full boiling temperature. Dropping to 95C shifts the profile toward the floral Huang Jin Gui parent.
